description: A square graphic in the 'THE WORST FIRST' template, this version without the small red corner banner and with a large red diagonal 'HOUSTON' banner across the bottom-right corner. The background is a desaturated, high-contrast black-and-white close-up photograph of handcuffed hands against a dark body. The top-left headline is light cyan bold sans-serif 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with white sub-line '1/26/2025 | Houston, TX.' In place of a name, large white bold sans-serif reads 'Mexican National.' Below is a 'CRIMES:' label with bulleted charges 'Aggravated assault with a deadly weapon' and 'Possession of a controlled substance.' The DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark are at bottom left.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/26/2025 | Houston, TX; Mexican National; CRIMES: Aggravated assault with a deadly weapon, Possession of a controlled substance; HOUSTON; ICE
